questionHtml: Describe the effect of neonicotinoid pesticides on the nervous system of insects.
markschemeHtml:
1. blocks synaptic transmission at (cholinergic synapses);
  2. binds to (acetylcholine) receptors;

meta.title: Describe the effect of neonicotinoid pesticides on the nervous system of insects.
breadcrumbLabels: C2.2.12. Effects of exogenous chemicals on synaptic transmission
